owner_facing_goal: 提供生成于深板岩层的深层灵石原矿，与普通灵石原矿共享铁镐门槛、精准采集和时运掉落规则。

behavior.server_client_boundary: Block mining eligibility and loot resolution are server-authoritative; the BlockItem only places the registered block and carries no client-authored state.
behavior.interaction: Requires an iron-tier or better pickaxe. Silk Touch drops myvillage:deepslate_spirit_stone_ore; otherwise it drops myvillage:low_grade_spirit_stone with the vanilla Fortune ore-drops bonus.
behavior.cooldown_or_durability: No item cooldown, durability, custom rarity, or custom data components.
tests: registered block and matching BlockItem are exposed in myvillage:main
mineable/pickaxe and needs_iron_tool tags contain the block id
Silk Touch returns the deepslate ore block itself
non-Silk-Touch mining returns low-grade spirit stone
Fortune applies the vanilla ore-drops formula
the shared configured feature targets deepslate with this block state

commands: in Survival, verify stone-tier tools do not harvest it, iron-tier tools do, Silk Touch preserves it, and Fortune raises low-grade spirit-stone drops
jar_checks: complete blockstate, block model, item model, block texture, bilingual name, loot table, and tool tags
three resource-owned placed features for upper, middle, and deep generation

non_goals: raw spirit stone or fragment items
Java-owned ore placement; the three-layer configured/placed feature and biome-modifier resources belong to the resource change
